Tentative Ruling adopted: Plaintiff's Motion For Protective Order Modifying Deposition Subpoena On Collins, Mason & Cote is denied as moot.
All requests for sanctions are denied. Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING FURTHER RESPONSES
Off Calendar Jan-24-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Nobody signed in.

Ruling:
Tentative Ruling adopted: Defendant's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, Compelling Prompt Production Of All Responsive Documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's inadequate responses were a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to respond further and to produce further within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $1,500, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
